metadata.name: Submit a Bid for a Government Contract

description: A registered vendor is submitting a bid for a public works contract.

nodes.task_description: Identify the vendor and the specific contract they are bidding on.

expected_outcome.value: Agent locates the vendor's profile and the open contract.

nodes.task_description: Verify that all required bidding documents have been uploaded.

expected_outcome.value: Agent confirms that the bid package is complete.

nodes.task_description: Accept and timestamp the bid submission before the deadline.

expected_outcome.value: Agent successfully logs the bid as received on time.
